title: Move boards to Workspace > Folders
excerpt:
When moving boards to a different Workspace, it would be very convenient if there was a dropdown option showing the Folders in that Workspace to move the board to. 
Currently, we have to move the board to the Workspace, …

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
When moving boards to a different Workspace, it would be very convenient if there was a dropdown option showing the Folders in that Workspace to move the board to.

Currently, we have to move the board to the Workspace, then go into the Workspace and move the board into the correct folder.

posts.author: arun.paudyal (Arun Paudyal [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DrGerry,

Arun here from Decadis AG – monday marketplace partner. We’ve listened closely to the challenges faced by customers like you, and built a solution that’s truly a game-changer. Meet Batch Hero for monday, your superhero for bulk operations and board management.

With Batch Hero, moving boards between workspaces or folders is just a matter of few clicks. Let me show you a quick demo of your use case!

And the best part? The app is still free!

Give it a try and see it for yourself. If you have further questions or would like to discuss your use cases, kindly reach out to us.

Best,
Arun
